name: OmopConditionCodes
title: OMOP Condition-domain codes (example subset)
description: Codes that route a FHIR Condition to the OMOP `condition_occurrence` table. Includes BOTH (a) standard SNOMED Condition concepts (~105K) AND (b) non-standard source codes that resolve to a standard Condition via concept_relationship 'Maps to' — ICD10CM (88K codes), ICD9CM (15K codes). Athena bundle gaps: ICD10 (WHO), MedDRA, Read, CIEL are not loaded.

extension.valueString:
-- standard Condition concepts
SELECT vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name FROM vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Condition' AND standard_concept = 'S'
UNION ALL
-- non-standard source codes that Maps to a standard Condition
SELECT c1.vocabulary_id, c1.concept_code, c1.concept_name FROM vocab.concept c1 JOIN vocab.concept_relationship cr ON cr.concept_id_1 = c1.concept_id AND cr.relationship_id = 'Maps to' AND cr.invalid_reason IS NULL JOIN vocab.concept c2 ON c2.concept_id = cr.concept_id_2 WHERE c2.domain_id = 'Condition' AND c2.standard_concept = 'S' AND c1.standard_concept IS DISTINCT FROM 'S'

concept.display: Diabetes mellitus type II, not stated as uncontrolled
Coronary atherosclerosis of native coronary artery
